title: ux-evaluator agent output
description: Machine-readable summary returned by the ux-evaluator agent after evaluating driver artifacts. Derives from the Output Format section of agents/ux-evaluator.md (findings.jsonl metadata record shape).

verdict.description: PROCEED = 0 findings; PROCEED_WITH_FOLLOWUPS = only LOW/MEDIUM findings; FIX_REQUIRED = HIGH or CRITICAL findings present; BLOCKED = run-dir or rubric missing.

checks_applied.description: Number of rubric checks that were executed (max 4 for rubric-v1).

findings_count.description: Total number of findings emitted to findings.jsonl.

findings_path.description: Absolute path to the findings.jsonl file produced.
